prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace the G1 garbage collector's concurrent marking and mixed collection cycle in openjdk/jdk. Find C++ source files implementing: the G1ConcurrentMark start trigger, the SATB marking queue processing, the remembered set scanning, and the mixed collection region selection.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the java-platform fixture.
